scope: Editorial works — the source of truth for article metadata and the site search index.
field_notes: Per work: id, title, category (work type), place, author, date, description (one sentence), keywords, ref (file id / folio / accession), href, hero (bound image path or null).

categories.description: Photo essays or standalone photographic work.
